title: alopecurus heleochloides
intro: Alopecurus heleochloides, also known as Chinese hair grass or wild millet, is a type of perennial grass native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alopecurus heleochloides include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions to promote overall well-being.
